skill.summary: Propose, confirm, and execute Safe multisig transactions using the Safe{Core} SDK (protocol-kit v6 / api-kit v4). TypeScript strict. Use when an agent needs to operate a Safe smart account — (1) create/predict a new Safe, (2) fetch Safe owners/threshold/nonce, (3) list pending multisig txs, (4) build + propose a tx, (5) add confirmations, (6) execute a tx onchain, or (7) troubleshoot Safe nonce/signature issues across chains (Base/Ethereum/Optimism/Arbitrum/Polygon/etc.).

latestVersion.changelog:
safe-multisig 2.1.0

- Replaces the legacy release with the full TypeScript-strict Safe multisig CLI (Safe{Core} protocol-kit v6 / api-kit v4).
- Core scripts: create-safe, safe-info, list-pending, propose-tx, approve-tx, execute-tx.
- Adds 70 tests + strict typecheck.
